text:
Equipment: RIE

Evaluator Guide

Task

You will serve as an evaluator and use either the VR Training Heuristics or Nielsen’s Heuristics to evaluate the VR Cleanroom – RIE Training Module.

4 Evaluators use HE checklist_Nielsen.xlsx ：

VR: Nick, a new VR evaluator

Education: Yuanyuan

Semiconductor: a new domain-specific evaluator

4 Evaluators use HE checklist_VR_Training (Revised).xlsx

VR: Prof. Murrell, Livia

Education: Yupei

Semiconductor: Mohammed

Materials Needed

VR headset

Nielsen HE Checklist (located at XR cleanroom Teams> Documents > General > HeuristicEvaluation > HE package 9.1_Validation> HE checklist_Nielsen.xlsx ) *Please download the version you need to your local device. Do not edit the template in the shared folder

Revised VR Training HE Checklist (located at XR cleanroom Teams> Documents > General > HeuristicEvaluation > HE package 9.1_Validation> HE checklist_VR_Training(Revised).xlsx) *Please download the version you need to your local device. Do not edit the template in the shared folder

Heuristic Evaluation Procedure

Step 1– Familiar with the Heuristics

Equipment: RIE

Read the HE checklist carefully. Review the principles, definition, and design strategies to ensure you understand them before starting.

Step2 - Evaluate Independently

Next, each evaluator should evaluate the interface on their own.

Become Familiar with the Product：Start the evaluation by moving through the interface as if you’re a user trying to complete a task. If you aren’t already familiar with this module, go through the task once just to learn the system, without attempting to evaluate anything.

Look for Issues: Once you feel comfortable and familiar with the module, go back through the task. On subsequent passes, look for design elements, features, or decisions that violate one of the heuristics & strategies — in other words, they don’t achieve that goal or follow that guideline.

Important notes:

Review the VR module as many times as needed, until all principles have been checked. Try to identify as many distinct issues as possible!!!

Step3 - Document Findings.

Report each issue using the HE checklist. Record the issue under the corresponding heuristic：

Problem Description: provide a clear and specific explanation; screenshots may be included.

Equipment: RIE

Violated Heuristic: explain how and why the heuristic was violated.

Severity Rating (Nielsen’s severity scale)

Suggested Solution (optional)

Example of recording usability issues:

1. Record the issue under the corresponding heuristic2. Clearly describ the issue 3. Rate the severity of the issue (follow the severity scale)

Contact

If you have any questions, please contact: xiaolei.guo@missouri.edu

Thank you for your participation!
